info.title: CargoWiseXUBExtractor
info.description: A tool to extract XUB messages from CargoWise

options.name: --output
options.description: (Default: out) Where to output the batches to.

options.name: --enterpriseID
options.description: Required. What enterprise ID to use.

options.name: --serverID
options.description: Required. What server ID to use.

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Required. The endpoint for the eAdapter inbound.

options.name: --username
options.description:
Required. The username to use for the inbound
connection.

options.name: --password
options.description: Required. The password to use for the inbound

options.name: --targetExpression
options.description:
Required. Target expression. The format is
'{companyName}:{targetBatch};' for a single batch.
'{companyName}:{fromBatch}-{toBatch};' for a range of
batches. You can combine multiple expression, seperated
by a ;. Target badge and ranges are INCLUSIVE!
